name: GH_IconPicker
summary: Provides a standard icon selection interface.

constructors.name: GH_IconPicker
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the GH_IconPicker class

methods.name: Dispose
methods.summary: Releases the unmanaged resources used by the GH_IconPicker and optionally releases the managed resources

params.name: disposing
params.doc: True to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources

properties.name: Icon
properties.summary: Gets or sets the icon to be displayed in this picker.

properties.name: IconChanged
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not the icon has been changed.
